terms.known: Per-palace score and whole-chart total; used for strength/weakness and transformation capacity.
terms.unknown: Exact formula and complete factor list.

terms.known: Separately named per-palace and whole-chart metric, presented with Phi Hóa/Thất Tinh context.
Displayed for palaces and stars alongside Hỉ/Kị/Nhàn and Cung Khí.

terms.known: Public output uses 20% stem, 50% branch, 30% nạp âm element mixture and Hỉ/Kị/Nhàn labels.
terms.unknown: How this mixture enters Huyền Khí.
